message:
chore(gitignore): ignore target-local/ alternate cargo target directory

target-local/ is used for local builds via CARGO_TARGET_DIR (keeps
main target/ pristine for CI caching). Build artifact, never commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,6 +42,7 @@ perf.data.*
 --graph-format.svg
 target-codex*/
 target_*/
+target-local/
 
 # Ephemeral files (agent-generated, build artifacts, test detritus)
 ci-artifacts/
